launchPages.title: Home
launchPages.pageIntent: Make the first step obvious, build trust quickly, and route visitors into support, programmes, or involvement.

launchPages.title: About
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain mission, vision, youth-led credibility, and why the organisation exists.

launchPages.title: Programmes
launchPages.pageIntent: Show the four support pillars and help visitors identify the most relevant route.

launchPages.title: Community & Friendship
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain belonging, safe-space design, and the welcoming route into community support.

launchPages.title: Personal Growth & Life Skills
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain confidence-building, life-skills development, and youth-led growth opportunities.

launchPages.title: Career Support & CV Help
launchPages.pageIntent: Clarify practical CV and job-readiness support and route visitors into the Saturday session.

launchPages.title: Community Support / Intergenerational Connection
launchPages.pageIntent: Describe wider community support beyond youth-only activity and route broader cross-age visitors into the right next step without implying a standing care or events service.

launchPages.title: Sessions
launchPages.pageIntent: Provide a clear join-a-session hub with current recurring offers, expectations, and practical next steps.

launchPages.title: CV Support Session
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain the practical CV support offer, the session rhythm, and what to expect before attending.

launchPages.title: Youth Club Session
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain the youth club atmosphere, the safe-space model, and how first-time attendees can join.

launchPages.title: Events & Updates
launchPages.pageIntent: Keep the site current without turning it into a high-maintenance news hub.

launchPages.title: Get Involved
launchPages.pageIntent: Route visitors into volunteering, partnership, referral, or support pathways without friction.

launchPages.title: Volunteer With Us
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain role pathways, checks, training, and time expectations for volunteers.

launchPages.title: Partner With Us
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain collaboration, referral, sponsorship, and partnership pathways with credibility.

launchPages.title: Contact
launchPages.pageIntent: Provide a low-friction contact route with clear guidance and short-form enquiry options.

launchPages.title: Safeguarding
launchPages.pageIntent: Provide calm, serious reassurance and separate child and adult safeguarding routes.

launchPages.title: Child Safeguarding
launchPages.pageIntent: Provide a dedicated child safeguarding route with clear emergency and reporting boundaries.

launchPages.title: Adult Safeguarding
launchPages.pageIntent: Provide a dedicated adult safeguarding route with clear emergency and reporting boundaries.

launchPages.title: Privacy Notice
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain how enquiry data is handled and link directly from every form.

launchPages.title: Cookie Notice
launchPages.pageIntent: Explain the live storage/access position, the first-party aggregate analytics model, the no-banner decision, and what must change before consent becomes necessary.

launchPages.title: Accessibility Statement
launchPages.pageIntent: Describe the site's accessibility commitment, known limitations, and contact route for help.

launchPages.title: Terms / Site Policy
launchPages.pageIntent: Provide a practical site policy for acceptable use, ownership, and liability boundaries.

launchPages.title: Page not found
launchPages.pageIntent: Recover visitors from broken or outdated links without losing trust.

phaseTwoPages.title: Gallery
phaseTwoPages.pageIntent: Show consented real photography once available.

phaseTwoPages.title: Impact & Stories
phaseTwoPages.pageIntent: Share proof, stories, and outcomes once real evidence is approved.

phaseTwoPages.title: Team
phaseTwoPages.pageIntent: Introduce the team once approved bios and headshots exist.
